message:
fix: unbounded cache growth + stale WASM buffer pool + vector string alloc

Memory leaks in long-running DOs:
- partitionCatalogs Map in QueryDO had no eviction — now evicted
  alongside datasetCache when oldest entry is removed
- FragmentDO footerCache (plain Map) had no size cap — now capped
  at 500 entries with oldest-eviction and SQLite cleanup
- local-executor readerFragmentCache had no eviction — now capped
  at 1000 entries matching metaCache policy

Cache invalidation:
- refreshStaleTables cleared WASM table but not buffer pool — stale
  page data at same byte offsets could be returned from L1 cache.
  Now calls cacheClear() after clearTable().

String allocation:
- Vector serialization in queryToSql and pg-wire formatValue used
  per-element += loop — replaced with Array.from().join() to avoid
  O(dim) intermediate string allocations.
